tools.name: golangci-lint
tools.notes: Uses golangci-lint v2 with extensive linter configuration. Timeout set to 5m0s. Excludes test files and generated code from some checks.

tools.name: pre-commit
tools.notes: Runs make lint, make generate manifests, make build-installer, make api-docs, plus standard pre-commit hooks

linting.notes: Linting is enforced via pre-commit hooks and GitHub Actions. The make lint target invokes golangci-lint with a comprehensive configuration disabling ~30 overly strict linters while enabling all others.

testing.framework: Go testing with testify, controller-runtime envtest
testing.mock_patterns: Uses controller-runtime envtest for Kubernetes API mocking
testing.notes: Unit tests use envtest which requires KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS. E2E tests (tests/e2e/) require a real Kubernetes cluster and are run separately via 'make test-e2e'. The make test target excludes e2e tests. Tests require Go 1.25.5+ with GOTOOLCHAIN=auto.

gating_checks.name: pre-commit
gating_checks.notes: Runs lint, generate manifests, build-installer, api-docs, and standard checks. Fails if there are uncommitted changes after pre-commit.

gating_checks.name: unit-tests
gating_checks.notes: Runs unit tests with coverage reporting via limgo. Coverage results uploaded as artifacts.

gating_checks.name: e2e-tests
gating_checks.notes: Requires kind cluster with local registry. Deploys operator to cluster, runs ./hack/deploy-quickstart.sh for Ollama, then runs e2e tests with 30m timeout.

gating_checks.name: tekton-multi-arch-build
gating_checks.notes: Tekton pipeline builds multi-arch container images via ODH Konflux central pipeline

ci.notes: Different CI workflows run for different branches: 'main' branch uses GitHub Actions for pre-commit and e2e tests, 'odh' branch uses GitHub Actions for coverage and Tekton for builds. E2E tests create a kind cluster, build and deploy the operator image, and run tests in tests/e2e/.

build.notes: Requires Go 1.25.5+. The Makefile provides comprehensive targets including build, image-build, deploy, test, lint, etc. Container builds use podman by default (CONTAINER_TOOL). Native multi-arch builds supported via make image-buildx.

conventions.test_naming: Test* functions (Go convention). Uses testify for assertions. Subtests use t.Run() with descriptive names.
conventions.import_style: Grouped imports: standard library, third-party, local packages. Enforced by gci linter via golangci-lint.
conventions.notes: Controller-based operator using kubebuilder/operator-sdk patterns. API types in api/v1alpha1/, controllers in controllers/, shared packages in pkg/. Generated code in api/v1alpha1/zz_generated.deepcopy.go is excluded from linting.

lint_commands.notes: Passed with 0 issues. Downloads golangci-lint v2.8.0 and runs full lint check with 5m timeout.

test_commands.notes: All unit tests passed. Coverage: controllers 59.9%, pkg/compare 31.8%, pkg/deploy 47.1%, pkg/deploy/plugins 83.0%. Excludes e2e tests.

container_recipe.notes: Go 1.25.5 is auto-downloaded by GOTOOLCHAIN=auto. The base golang:1.22 image works because GOTOOLCHAIN handles version switching. The make test target automatically downloads controller-gen, yq, envtest, and golangci-lint to ./bin/. KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS is set by make test but must be explicitly set for direct go test invocations.

results.notes: Lint passed with 0 issues. Downloaded golangci-lint v2.8.0 to ./bin/

ok  	github.com/llamastack/llama-stack-k8s-operator/pkg/cluster	0.039s	coverage: 0.0% of statements
ok  	github.com/llamastack/llama-stack-k8s-operator/pkg/compare	0.017s	coverage: 31.8% of statements
ok  	github.com/llamastack/llama-stack-k8s-operator/pkg/deploy	5.897s	coverage: 47.1% of statements
ok  	github.com/llamastack/llama-stack-k8s-operator/pkg/deploy/plugins	0.025s	coverage: 83.0% of statements
results.notes: All unit tests passed. Total test time ~16s. Coverage ranges from 0% (cluster pkg has no unit tests) to 83% (deploy/plugins).

validation.summary: install OK, fmt OK, vet OK, lint OK (0 issues), tests OK (all packages passed, 31-83% coverage)

gaps: E2E tests require Kubernetes cluster infrastructure (kind/OpenShift) and cannot be validated in a simple container
Pre-commit hooks require Python pre-commit tool installation which wasn't validated
Some packages have 0% test coverage (pkg/cluster, pkg/featureflags)
Container image build validation skipped (requires buildx/manifest tools)
The make test target downloads several tools (controller-gen, envtest, yq) on first run which adds ~30s overhead
